revision.comment: Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles lacking sources from September 2019]] <!--categories--> [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

<!--templates--> <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles lacking sources from September 2019]] <!--categories--> [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]]

<!--templates--> <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles lacking sources from September 2019]] <!--categories--> [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]]

<!--templates--> <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles lacking sources from September 2019]] <!--categories--> [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:articles with]]
